scripts.build: cd apps/next && (test -x node_modules/.bin/next || npm install --silent) && node_modules/.bin/next build
scripts.build:dev: cd apps/next && (test -x node_modules/.bin/next || npm install --silent) && node_modules/.bin/next build
scripts.dev: cd apps/next && (test -x node_modules/.bin/next || npm install --silent) && node_modules/.bin/next dev
